label: Circuit Breaker Status
description: Per-venue circuit breaker cards with status badges, trip thresholds, and manual reset controls.

0.7.note: empty state renders 'No venue CB data'.

0.8.note: — added hasError block returning error message.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary via widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 ✓ no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ no lib/mocks import. 0.6 ✓ isLoading spinner. 0.7 ✓ empty state renders 'No venue CB data'. 0.8 FIXED — added hasError block returning error message. 0.9 ✓ no dead code.

1.7.note: ⚠ MOCK_STRATEGIES/STRATEGY_RISK_MAP/COMPONENT_TO_RISK_TYPE re-exported from lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data via context — these are reference data that belong in lib/constants/risk. Not consumed by this widget; tracked as domain-level finding.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ data exclusively from useRiskData(). 1.2 ✓ use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 ✓ scope.organizationIds feeds scopeStrategyIds → riskLimits filter. 1.4 ✓ scope.clientIds via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.5 ✓ scope.strategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 ✓ empty scope → unfiltered data (scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 guard). 1.7 ⚠ MOCK_STRATEGIES/STRATEGY_RISK_MAP/COMPONENT_TO_RISK_TYPE re-exported from lib/mocks/fixtures/risk-data via context — these are reference data that belong in lib/constants/risk. Not consumed by this widget; tracked as domain-level finding.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ (real-time CB status), paper — N/A (CB status is venue-specific; paper mode may not have live CB data), batch ✓ (read-only historical status). Widget is display-only.

3.2.note: isBatchMode in context; not used by this widget (read-only display).

3.5.note: Paper mode: display paper account CB statuses if available. Widget is read-only.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.4 (batch indicator visible in layout).

4.1.note: No interactive buttons — read-only display widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.8 (grid cards scroll within WidgetScroll bounds).

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategies with active venue connections. venueCircuitBreakers keyed by venue + strategy_id. Shows OPEN/HALF_OPEN/CLOSED status and kill_switch_active.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 10 tests covering render (3), status badges (3), kill switch (2), loading+error (2). See tests/widgets/risk/risk-circuit-breakers.test.tsx

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex colors. bg-emerald-500/20 etc. are Tailwind semantic classes, not arbitrary values.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.1.note: text-[9px]/text-[10px]/text-[11px] replaced with text-nano/text-micro/text-caption tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, Spinner, WidgetScroll shared components.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no bare div onClick, no unlabelled inputs. Display-only.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=4, minH=2 required.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 needs human verification.

mergeCandidate.rationale: Both show CB status per strategy. Heatmap shows per-strategy row with actions; circuit-breakers shows per-venue status cards. Complementary views — keep separate.

relationships.notes: Venue-level CB status view complements the strategy-level heatmap.

gaps: TradFi/Sports venues not yet represented in CB registry
coverage.notes: Per-venue circuit breaker card grid. 2-column layout.

knownIssues: Domain-level: MOCK_STRATEGIES/STRATEGY_RISK_MAP/COMPONENT_TO_RISK_TYPE should move from lib/mocks/ to lib/constants/risk (affects all risk widgets via context re-export)

findings.description: 0.8 fix: added hasError early-return block (was missing, only isLoading was handled)
risk-circuit-breakers-widget.tsx — ~5 user-visible strings (status labels, 'Kill Switch Active', 'No venue CB data')
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-circuit-breakers-widget.tsx — text-[9px], text-[10px], text-[11px] used for dense CB card labels
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px), text-nano (9px), text-caption (11px) tokens per consolidated globals.css; arbitrary text-[Npx] classes removed

findings.description: Widget is read-only — no per-venue trip/reset/kill control. Actions live in risk-strategy-heatmap (per-strategy). Venue-level manual CB override is an acknowledged gap; kill-switch banner surfaces status but not control.
findings.deferReason: Design intent per widget description ('status badges'). Keep-separate rationale already recorded in relationships.mergeCandidate.
